subject: Re: CloudStack API Integration Timeline - Q2 Confirmation & Sandbox Access
body:
Hi,

Thank you for the follow-up on the CloudStack API integration timeline. We can confirm that Q2 2026 is our target window for completing this integration.

To move forward with development and testing, we'll need sandbox credentials from CloudStack's team. Specifically, we're requesting:

- Sandbox API endpoint URL
- API key and secret key (or equivalent authentication credentials)
- Any test account details required to validate the integration
- Documentation on sandbox limitations or differences from production

Once we receive these credentials, our engineering team will be able to begin integration testing in our development environment.

Please let us know the expected timeline for CloudStack to provide these sandbox credentials, and feel free to reach out if you need any additional information from our side.

Best regards,
Internal Communications
TechCorp
